title: Staff Management
searchPlaceholder: Search username, name, email, or phone

currentStore.label: Current store
currentStore.helper: Choose a managed store, or view every staff account in your managed store scope.

fields.fixedRoleHint: Accounts created here are always staff accounts, assigned to the selected managed store, and set as casual staff.

detail.title: Staff Details
detail.missingDescription: Open a staff profile from Staff Management.

schedule.title: This Week's Schedule
schedule.description: View this staff member's weekly schedule in the detail page instead of leaving for the shared attendance screen.
schedule.loadFailedDescription: The staff schedule could not be loaded right now. Please try again.
schedule.endpointUnavailable: The backend employee schedule endpoint is not available yet. Add the endpoint and try again.

records.title: Recent Records
records.description: Review this staff member's recent punches, leave requests, and approval records.
records.loadFailedDescription: The staff records could not be loaded right now. Please try again.
records.endpointUnavailable: The backend employee records endpoint is not available yet. Add the endpoint and try again.
records.emptyDescription: There are no punches, leave requests, or approvals to show yet.

dialogs.resetPasswordDescription: Set a new password for {{username}}. Share it with this staff member after saving.
dialogs.statusConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to {{action}} {{username}}?

messages.noAccessDescription: The current account cannot manage store staff.
messages.selectStoreDescription: Choose a store before viewing or managing staff accounts for that store.
messages.loadFailedDescription: Try again later or pull to refresh.
messages.emptyDescription: Add the first staff account for the current store.
messages.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
messages.passwordTooLong: Password must be 100 characters or fewer
messages.saveFailed: Failed to save the staff account.
messages.statusFailed: Failed to update the staff status.
